abstract.t: This document defines OAuth Actor-Signed Hop Proofs, an optional companion profile for delegated OAuth tokens that conform to the OAuth Actor Profile for Delegation. It introduces the actor_proofs claim, a signed per-hop proof chain in which the actor added at each visible hop signs its own participation and the target binding it authorized for that hop. Proofs are linked into a hash chain, are validated against actor verification keys resolved through pre- established trust, and optionally cross-reference sibling actor receipts. This document also defines a token request parameter for conveying proofs at issuance, and metadata and introspection parameters for advertising and consuming actor-proof support.
